creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
Any reason to drop USES=go?
The following patch works for me.

Index: Makefile
===================================================================
--- Makefile    (revision 476839)
+++ Makefile    (working copy)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@

 PORTNAME=      git-lfs
 DISTVERSIONPREFIX=     v
-DISTVERSION=   2.4.2
+DISTVERSION=   2.5.1
 CATEGORIES=    devel

 MAINTAINER=    kenji@k2r.org
@@ -11,8 +11,6 @@
 LICENSE=       MIT
 LICENSE_FILE=  ${WRKSRC}/LICENSE.md

-BUILD_DEPENDS= bash:shells/bash
-
 USES=          go
 USE_GITHUB=    yes
 PLIST_FILES=   bin/git-lfs
@@ -21,10 +19,7 @@

 # see https://github.com/git-lfs/git-lfs/wiki/Installation

-do-build:
-       @cd ${WRKSRC} && ${MKDIR} ${WRKSRC}/.tmp && ${SETENV} ${MAKE_ENV} ${GO_ENV} TMPDIR=${WRKSRC}/.tmp script/bootstrap
-
 do-install:
-       ${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/bin/git-lfs ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin/git-lfs
+       ${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${GO_WRKDIR_BIN}/git-lfs ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin/git-lfs

 .include <bsd.port.mk>
Index: distinfo
===================================================================
--- distinfo    (revision 476839)
+++ distinfo    (working copy)
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-TIMESTAMP = 1528623531
-SHA256 (git-lfs-git-lfs-v2.4.2_GH0.tar.gz) = 130a552a27c8f324ac0548baf9db0519c4ae96c26a85f926c07ebe0f15a69fc2
-SIZE (git-lfs-git-lfs-v2.4.2_GH0.tar.gz) = 791443
+TIMESTAMP = 1533917146
+SHA256 (git-lfs-git-lfs-v2.5.1_GH0.tar.gz) = 85c3148c7cbd9216e356b9317bc726ff8d982b37654ec1b26c537238ba9bfd8e
+SIZE (git-lfs-git-lfs-v2.5.1_GH0.tar.gz) = 946596
